name: Taylor Morgan
summary: Data analyst and early-career AI product builder with experience translating business needs into dashboards, workflow automations, and candidate-facing tools.

bullets: Built reporting dashboards that reduced weekly recruiting ops review time by 35%.
Partnered with recruiters and engineers to define metrics for candidate funnel performance.
Tested prompt variations for internal writing assistants used in resume and cover letter generation.
Cleaned and analyzed patient operations data using Python and SQL.
Created Tableau dashboards for leadership to track appointment utilization trends.
Documented KPI definitions and presented weekly insights to stakeholders.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics
details: Relevant Coursework: Data Mining, Database Systems, Applied Machine Learning

bullets: Built a prototype application that tailors resumes and cover letters from candidate data and job descriptions.
Designed prompts and structured outputs for recruiter-friendly document generation.
Created a lightweight LLM workflow to generate likely interview questions from job postings.

name: Jordan Lee
summary: Full-stack software engineer with 4 years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about developer experience and CI/CD automation.

bullets: Led migration of monolithic API to microservices, reducing deploy times by 60%.
Built real-time notification system handling 500K events/day using Kafka and WebSockets.
Mentored 3 junior engineers through code reviews and pair programming sessions.
Developed REST APIs in Python/FastAPI serving 2M+ requests daily.
Implemented automated testing pipeline that increased code coverage from 45% to 88%.
Designed and built admin dashboard using React and TypeScript.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

bullets: Open-source internal developer portal used by 200+ engineers.
Built plugin system for custom integrations with Jira, PagerDuty, and Datadog.

awards_and_achievements.title: Hack the Future Winner
awards_and_achievements.description: First place at company hackathon for real-time anomaly detection tool.
